mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exam_paper WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND student_id = #{studentId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_paper (exam_id, paper_id, student_id, answer_status, start_time, device_info) VALUES (#{examId}, #{paperId}, #{studentId}, #{answerStatus}, #{startTime}, #{deviceInfo})
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_paper SET answer_status = #{answerStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exam_paper WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS participant_count, SUM(CASE WHEN answer_status >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS submit_count, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN answer_status >= 2 THEN total_score ELSE NULL END), 1) AS avg_score, ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN answer_status >= 2 THEN total_score ELSE NULL END), 1) AS max_score, ROUND(MIN(CASE WHEN answer_status >= 2 THEN total_score ELSE NULL END), 1) AS min_score FROM exam_paper WHERE exam_id = #{examId}

SELECT ep.id AS examPaperId, ep.student_id AS studentId, ep.total_score AS totalScore, ep.answer_status AS answerStatus, u.real_name AS studentName, u.student_no AS studentNo FROM exam_paper ep JOIN sys_user u ON ep.student_id = u.id WHERE ep.exam_id = #{examId} AND ep.answer_status >= 2 ORDER BY ep.total_score DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_paper WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND answer_status >= 2

SELECT ep.id AS examPaperId, ep.student_id AS studentId, ep.answer_status AS answerStatus, ep.cut_screen_count AS cutScreenCount, ep.violation_count AS violationCount, ep.used_minutes AS usedMinutes, ep.total_score AS totalScore, u.real_name AS studentName, u.student_no AS studentNo FROM exam_paper ep JOIN sys_user u ON ep.student_id = u.id WHERE ep.exam_id = #{examId} ORDER BY ep.answer_status, u.real_name

SELECT ep.id AS examPaperId, ep.exam_id AS examId, ep.start_time AS startTime, e.exam_name AS examName, e.end_time AS endTime, e.duration_minutes AS durationMinutes, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_answer ea WHERE ea.exam_paper_id = ep.id AND ea.answer_status >= 1) AS answeredCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_answer ea WHERE ea.exam_paper_id = ep.id) AS totalCount FROM exam_paper ep JOIN exam e ON ep.exam_id = e.id WHERE ep.student_id = #{studentId} AND ep.answer_status = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM exam_paper ep JOIN sys_user u ON ep.student_id = u.id
AND u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentName}, '%')
